title: Thales Launches World's First GSMA Certified iSIM (Integrated SIM) with Qualcomm's latest Snapdragon Mobile Platform

title: The Top Guru Stock Picks of the 4th Quarter
text: The fourth quarter of 2022 was the light at the end of the tunnel for equity markets as they recouped some of their losses from the rest of the year. The S&P 500 climbed 7.6% for the quarter to end the year with a loss of 18.11%, while the Nasdaq narrowed its loss to 0.8% for the quarter to end the year down 32.5% and the Dow Jones Industrial Average popped 15.3% for a full-year drawdown of just 8.7%.

title: Qualcomm Selects Adobe To Deepen Customer Relationships With Real-Time Personalization
